label: Fold
subject_description: A piece of rectangular white paper mid-fold, with the right half visibly lifted up at a 45-degree angle being folded over onto the left half, motion lines showing the folding action, two natural-looking hands each with five clear well-formed proportional fingers — one hand at the bottom resting flat on the paper with palm down and fingers spread naturally and not awkward, one hand at the top lifting and folding the corner upward, both hands realistic and well-drawn
full_prompt: A piece of rectangular white paper mid-fold, with the right half visibly lifted up at a 45-degree angle being folded over onto the left half, motion lines showing the folding action, two natural-looking hands each with five clear well-formed proportional fingers — one hand at the bottom resting flat on the paper with palm down and fingers spread naturally and not awkward, one hand at the top lifting and folding the corner upward, both hands realistic and well-drawn, children's AAC communication symbol, friendly illustration style, soft rounded shapes, natural coloured fills with gentle shading, white background, single object centred, no text, no labels, crisp clean lines, warm and engaging, human figures with natural skin tones (avoid bright red on skin), no medication or pills, style similar to PCS HD educational picture symbols.

label: Go away
subject_description: A clear scene with a single person on the LEFT side of the frame making a firm shooing gesture with both hands raised palms facing outward to the RIGHT in a pushing-away motion, with motion lines streaming to the RIGHT and a small rightward-pointing arrow indicating something or someone should leave, the away-direction and shooing intent are both unambiguous

label: Need quiet
subject_description: A face viewed from the front with a single index finger held vertically and pressed firmly against closed lips in a clear SHUSH gesture, with a small 'shh' text written in BLACK letters inside a WHITE oval speech bubble beside the head (the speech bubble MUST be solid WHITE colour with a thin dark outline so it's clearly distinct from skin tones, the black text inside is clearly readable against the white background), head and shoulders

label: Try
subject_description: A determined-looking child with a focused effort expression (NOT sad, NOT crying, NOT distressed — the face shows determination and persistence) reaching both hands forward toward a challenging task just in front of them, with small motion lines around the hands showing active effort and a small gold star or sparkle above the head indicating perseverance, head and shoulders, the message is unambiguously 'making an effort, trying hard'
